Navbar.ugModulesDesc: Jonga zonke iimodyuli ze-CS ze-undergraduate ngonyaka.
Navbar.ugGuideDesc: Ulwakhiwo lwedigri, iindawo eziphambili, kunye nembono yekharityhulam.
Navbar.ugProspectiveDesc: Ukwamkelwa, iimfuno, kunye nendlela yokufaka isicelo.
Navbar.pgModulesDesc: Ikhathalogu yeemodyuli ze-Honours, Masters, kunye ne-PhD.
Navbar.contactDepartmentDesc: Umnxeba, i-imeyile, kunye nokutyelelwa kwesebe lethu.
Navbar.aboutDepartmentDesc: Imbali, injongo, nombono we-SU Computer Science.
Navbar.aboutAlumniDesc: Abaphumeleleyo abaye bayila isebe lethu kunye nomhlaba.

NotFound.heading: Iphepha alifumaneki
NotFound.terminal:
$ cd /iphepha
-bash: cd: /iphepha: Akukho fayile okanye ulawulo olunjalo
$ find / -name 'iphepha' -type f
find: Akukho ziphumo zifunyenweyo.
$ echo $?

Hero.description: Ngaphezulu kweminyaka engama-50, iSebe leNzululwazi yeKhompyutha yaseStellenbosch ibikwindawo ephambili ezintsha — iphuhlisa uphando kwaye iphuhlisa iinkokeli eziqhuba itekhnoloji kunye nokufumanisa kwihlabathi liphela.

Features.title: Kutheni i-CS yaseStellenbosch?
Features.subtitle: Fumanisa ukuba yintoni eyenza isebe lethu libe likhokelo kwimfundo ye-computer science kunye nophando.
Features.worldClassDescription: Iidigri ze-undergraduate kunye ne-postgraduate ezilungiselelwe ukuvelisa abafundi abakulungele ishishini.
Features.researchDescription: Amaqela ophando asebenzayo kwi-AI, ukufunda koomatshini, inzululwazi yedatha, kunye nokhuseleko lwedijithali.
Features.communityDescription: Indawo yokusebenzisana edibanisa abafundi, ootitshala, kunye namaqabane oshishino.
Features.globalDescription: Abafundi bethu abaphumelele basebenza kwiinkampani eziphambili zetekhnoloji nakumaziko ophando kwihlabathi liphela.
Features.facultyDescription: Funda kubaphandi abaziwa ngamazwe ngamazwe kunye nootitshala abanamava.
Features.handsOnDescription: Iikharityhulam ezisekelwe kwiiprojekthi ezilungiselela imingeni yokwenyani ye-software engineering.

Programmes.title: Iinkqubo zethu
Programmes.subtitle: Ukusuka kwiziseko ze-undergraduate ukuya kuphando lwe-postgraduate, fumana indlela efanelekileyo yekamva lakho.
Programmes.bscDescription: Idigri ye-undergraduate yeminyaka emithathu enika isiseko esiluqilima kwiialgorithm, iinkqubo, kunye ne-software engineering.
Programmes.honsDescription: Unyaka we-honours onzulu onemisebenzi ephambili kunye neprojekthi yophando kwindawo ekhethekileyo.
Programmes.mscDescription: Iinkqubo zophando lwe-postgraduate ezilawulwa ziingcali ezikhokelayo kwiindawo ezahlukeneyo.

Contact.title: Qhagamshelana nathi
Contact.description: Unemibuzo malunga neenkqubo zethu, uphando, okanye nantoni na? Singathanda ukuva kuwe.

ContactPage.title: Qhagamshelana nathi
ContactPage.subtitle: Qhagamshelana neSebe leNzululwazi yeKhompyutha eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch.
ContactPage.visitText: Isebe likwindawo yesihlanu yesakhiwo se-General Engineering.

Footer.tagline: Ukuqhubela phambili imfundo kunye nophando lwe-computer science kwiYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch iminyaka engaphezulu kwe-50.

ProgrammesWizard.heroSubtitle: Phendula imibuzo embalwa ekhawulezayo kwaye siza kukwalathisa kwinkcazelo efanelekileyo nge-Computer Science eStellenbosch.
ProgrammesWizard.chooseLevelSubtitle: Khetha umgangatho ohambelana nendawo okhoyo kuhambo lwakho lwemfundo.
ProgrammesWizard.undergraduateDesc: Idigri yeminyaka emi-3 ye-BSc eyakha isiseko esiluqilima kwiialgorithm, iinkqubo, kunye ne-software engineering.
ProgrammesWizard.postgraduateDesc: Isifundo esiphambili kunye nophando — I-Honours, Masters, okanye PhD kwi-Computer Science.
ProgrammesWizard.honoursDesc: Inkqubo yonyaka enye enomsebenzi wekhosetyhulam kunye neprojekthi yophando.
ProgrammesWizard.mastersDesc: Inkqubo yophando esekwe kwithisisi, ngokuqhelekileyo unyaka oyi-1–2. Iquka i-MSc eyakhiweyo kwi-ML kunye ne-AI.
ProgrammesWizard.phdDesc: Uphando lwe-Doctoral oluvelisa igalelo lokuqala kwi-Computer Science.
ProgrammesWizard.situationSubtitle: Oku kusinceda ukucebisa amaphepha nemithombo efanelekileyo kuwe.
ProgrammesWizard.situationProspectiveDesc: Ndicinga ukufaka isicelo kwaye ndifuna ukufunda ngokwamkelwa, iimfuno, kunye nento elindelekileyo.
ProgrammesWizard.situationCurrentDesc: Sele ndifunda eStellenbosch kwaye ndikhangela iindlela zam ze-CS okanye ndicwangcisa unyaka wam olandelayo.
ProgrammesWizard.situationInternationalDesc: Ndisekwe ngaphandle koMzantsi Afrika kwaye ndinomdla wokufunda i-CS eStellenbosch.
ProgrammesWizard.situationProspectiveDescPg: Ndicinga ukufaka isicelo sesifundo se-postgraduate kwaye ndifuna ukwazi ngeemfuno zokungena kunye nenkqubo yesicelo.
ProgrammesWizard.situationCurrentDescPg: Ndiyagqiba idigri yam yangoku e-SU kwaye ndifuna ukuqhubeka ne-postgraduate CS.
ProgrammesWizard.situationInternationalDescPg: Ndingumfundi wamazwe ngamazwe onomdla kwisifundo se-postgraduate eStellenbosch.
ProgrammesWizard.resultsSubtitle: Ngokusekwe kwizinto ozikhetheyo, la maphepha aza kuba luncedo kuwe.
ProgrammesWizard.tipUgProspective: Qala ngephepha labafundi abaza kufunda — liqwalasela yonke into ukusuka kwiimfuno zokwamkelwa kunye namanqaku e-APS ukuya kwindlela yokufaka isicelo. Izicelo zivulwa ngokuqhelekileyo phakathi enyakeni yokwamkelwa kwaFebruwari elandelayo.
ProgrammesWizard.tipUgCurrent: Jonga iSikhokelo seNkqubo ukufumana iindawo eziphambili kunye nokucwangcisa ikharityhulam. Ukuba ucinga nge-Honours emva kwe-BSc yakho, uya kufuna ubuncinane u-60% kwiimodyuli ezininzi zonyaka wesithathu ze-CS.
ProgrammesWizard.tipUgInternational: Abafundi bamazwe ngamazwe kufuneka bafake isicelo ngokusebenzisa ukwamkelwa okumbindi kweYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch. Kuya kufuneka uhlolwe iziqinisekiso zakho yi-SAQA kwaye ungafuna ivisa yokufunda — qala kwangoko!
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgProspectiveHons: Izicelo ze-Honours zonyaka olandelayo zivala ngokuqhelekileyo malunga no-Okthobha. Uya kufuna i-BSc ene-Computer Science njengento ephambili kunye nobuncinane u-60% kwiimodyuli ezininzi zonyaka wesithathu.
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgProspectiveMsc: Ukufaka isicelo se-Masters, uya kufuna idigri ye-Honours (okanye elinganiselayo) kwi-Computer Science. Qala ngokufumana umongameli onokuthi onomdla wophando ohambelana nowakho.
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgProspectivePhd: Abafaki-zicelo be-PhD bafuna idigri ye-Masters (okanye i-Honours engaqhelekanga) kwi-Computer Science. Qhagamshelana nabongameli abanokuthi kwangoko — ukufumana umongameli ngumnyathelo wokuqala.
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgCurrentHons: Njengomfundi okhoyo, unokufaka isicelo ngqo ngeSebe. Thetha nabafundisi abahleli ngezihloko zeprojekthi ye-Honours — yenza ukuguqula kube lula kakhulu.
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgCurrentMsc: Njengoko sele use-SU, finyelela kubaphandi kwisebe abanomsebenzi okuthanda. Iphepha lamaqela ophando lesebe yindawo entle yokuqala.
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgCurrentPhd: Thetha nomongameli wakho wangoku okanye amanye amalungu abafundisi ngeethuba ze-PhD. Ukuba uyagqiba i-MSc yakho, xoxa ngokuba unokuqhubeka nomongameli wakho wethisisi.
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgInternationalHons: Abafaki-zicelo be-Honours bamazwe ngamazwe kufuneka bafake isicelo ngokusebenzisa ukwamkelwa kwe-postgraduate kweYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch. Uya kufuna uhlolo lwe-SAQA lweziqinisekiso zakho kunye nevisa yokufunda.
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgInternationalMsc: Abafundi be-Masters bamazwe ngamazwe banokufunda ngesiqingatha sexesha besuka phesheya kwamanye amatyala. Qhagamshelana nesebe ukuxoxa ngamalungiselelo nomongameli onokuthi.
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgInternationalPhd: Abafundi be-PhD bamazwe ngamazwe bamkelekile. Amanye amathuba enkxaso-mali akho nge-NRF kunye neebhasari zase-SU. Qhagamshelana nomongameli onokuthi ukuxoxa ngesindululo sakho sophando.
ProgrammesWizard.ugProspectiveDesc: Inkcazelo yokwamkelwa, iimfuno zokungena, kunye nendlela yokufaka isicelo se-undergraduate CS.
ProgrammesWizard.ugGuideDesc: Jonga ulwakhiwo lwedigri, iindawo eziphambili, kunye nembono yekharityhulam.
ProgrammesWizard.ugModulesDesc: Jonga zonke iimodyuli ze-Computer Science ze-undergraduate ngonyaka.
ProgrammesWizard.pgProspectiveDesc: Iimfuno zokungena, indlela yokufaka isicelo, inkxaso-mali, kunye ne-FAQ zesifundo se-postgraduate.
ProgrammesWizard.pgProgrammeDesc: Funda ngolwakhiwo, iimfuno, kunye neziphumo zenkqubo ye-{programme}.
ProgrammesWizard.pgModulesDesc: Brawuza ikhathalogu epheleleyo yeemodyuli ze-Honours, Masters, kunye ne-PhD.
ProgrammesWizard.contactDeptDesc: Unemibuzo? Qhagamshelana neSebe le-CS ngokuthe ngqo.

Metadata.title: I-Computer Science | Yunivesithi yaseStellenbosch
Metadata.description: Iwebhusayithi yeSebe le-Computer Science eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch. Jonga iinkqubo zethu, uphando, kunye noluntu.
Metadata.keywords: computer science, yunivesithi yaseStellenbosch, mzantsi afrika, BSc, honours, masters, PhD, ukuprogram, algorithms, machine learning, AI
Metadata.homeDescription: Fumana iSebe le-Computer Science eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch — ngaphezulu kweminyaka engama-50 yobuchule kwimfundo, uphando, kunye nobuchule obutsha.
Metadata.contactDescription: Qhagamshelana neSebe le-Computer Science eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch. Fumana idilesi yethu, umnxeba, i-imeyile, kunye nendawo ye-ofisi.
Metadata.programmesDescription: Phendula imibuzo embalwa ukufumana inkqubo efanelekileyo ye-Computer Science eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch.
Metadata.researchDescription: Jonga uphando eSebeni le-CS eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch — i-automata theory, i-software engineering, i-machine learning, i-AI, kunye ne-telecommunications.
Metadata.ugModulesDescription: Jonga zonke iimodyuli ze-Computer Science ze-undergraduate eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch, zilungiselelwe ngonyaka.
Metadata.ugGuideDescription: Yonke into ofuna ukuyazi malunga nedigri ye-BSc Computer Science eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch.
Metadata.ugProspectiveDescription: Ukwamkelwa, iimfuno, kunye nendlela yokufaka isicelo se-undergraduate Computer Science eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch.
Metadata.pgModulesDescription: Jonga iimodyuli ze-Honours, Masters, kunye ne-PhD ze-Computer Science eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch.
Metadata.pgProspectiveDescription: Iimfuno zokungena, inkqubo yokufaka isicelo, kunye nolwazi lwenkxaso-mali ye-postgraduate Computer Science eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch.
Metadata.pgHonoursDescription: Inkqubo ye-honours yonyaka epheleleyo ye-Computer Science eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch — umsebenzi wekosi, iprojekthi yophando, nokulungiswa kwekhariyer.
Metadata.pgMastersDescription: I-Masters esekwe kwithisisi ye-Computer Science eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch — ukhokelo lophando lokwenene lwehlabathi.
Metadata.pgPhdDescription: Uphando lwe-Doctoral kwi-Computer Science eYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch — igalelo lokuqala kunye nabaphandi abaziwa kwihlabathi.

HomeShowcase.title: Apho Ikhowudi Idibana Nokufumanisa
HomeShowcase.subtitle: Ukusuka kwii-algorithms ukuya kwi-artificial intelligence, abaphandi nabafundi bethu batyhalela imida yoko kunokwenzeka kwinzululwazi yekhompyutha.

ResearchPreview.title: Uphando Olubalulekileyo
ResearchPreview.subtitle: Abafundisi nabafundi bethu baphonononga iindawo ezintsha kwinzululwazi yekhompyutha.

Journey.title: Uhambo Lwakho Lwezifundo
Journey.subtitle: Yila indlela yakho kwiNzululwazi yeKhompyutha eStellenbosch — ukusuka kwiziseko zokuqala ukuya kuphando lobugqirha.
Journey.bscDesc: Yakha isiseko esomeleleyo kwii-algorithms, ukuprogram, iisistim kunye nobunjineli besoftware.
Journey.honsDesc: Unyaka we-honours oxineneyo onomsebenzi wekhosi oqhubelekileyo kunye neprojekthi yophando kwindawo yakho ekhethekileyo.
Journey.mscDesc: Inkqubo yophando esekwe kwithisisi ekhokelwa ngamaqabane ezemfundo kwindawo yakho ekhethiweyo.
Journey.phdDesc: Uphando lwe-doctoral oluvelisa igalelo lokuqala kwicandelo leNzululwazi yeKhompyutha.
